titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon the Owner of a Frenzied Camel if it Kills a Man
Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon the Owner of a Frenzied Camel if it Kills a Man

segments: "صَاحِبُ اَلْبُخْتِيِّ ضَامِنٌ لِلدِّيَةِ وَ يَقْبِضُ ثَمَنَ بُخْتِيِّهِ".
arabic.text: "صَاحِبُ اَلْبُخْتِيِّ ضَامِنٌ لِلدِّيَةِ وَ يَقْبِضُ ثَمَنَ بُخْتِيِّهِ".

segments:
Hadith.5369 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi, who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), that he was asked about a male camel (bukhti) that became enraged, left the house, and killed a man. Then the brother of the man came and struck the camel with a sword, injuring it.
Imam (as) said: "The owner of the camel is liable for the blood money, and he is entitled to receive the price of his camel."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5369 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi, who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), that he was asked about a male camel (bukhti) that became enraged, left the house, and killed a man. Then the brother of the man came and struck the camel with a sword, injuring it.
Imam (as) said: "The owner of the camel is liable for the blood money, and he is entitled to receive the price of his camel."

narratorChain.raw: 5369 - رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : سُئِلَ عَنْ بُخْتِيٍّ اِغْتَلَمَ فَخَرَجَ مِنَ اَلدَّارِ فَقَتَلَ رَجُلاً فَجَاءَ أَخُو اَلرَّجُلِ فَضَرَبَ اَلْفَحْلَ بِالسَّيْفِ فَعَقَرَهُ فَقَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : سُئِلَ
بُخْتِيٍّ اِغْتَلَمَ فَخَرَجَ مِنَ اَلدَّارِ فَقَتَلَ رَجُلاً فَجَاءَ أَخُو اَلرَّجُلِ فَضَرَبَ اَلْفَحْلَ بِالسَّيْفِ فَعَقَرَهُ
